scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/mongodb/node_modules/bson/lib/bson.cjs';if(fs.existsSync(p)){let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');c=c.replace(\"globalThis?.process?.getBuiltinModule('v8')\",\"(()=>{try{return globalThis?.process?.getBuiltinModule?.('v8')}catch(_){return{}}})()\" );c=c.replace('startupSnapshot?.isBuildingSnapshot()','(()=>{try{return typeof startupSnapshot?.isBuildingSnapshot==="function"&&startupSnapshot.isBuildingSnapshot()}catch(_){return false}})()');fs.writeFileSync(p,c);console.log('bson patched for Bun')}" 2>/dev/null || true
